diseases.name: Malaria
diseases.initial_advice: Drink plenty of fluids and take antimalarial medication as prescribed. Seek immediate medical attention if symptoms worsen.

diseases.name: Diarrhea
diseases.initial_advice: Stay hydrated with oral rehydration salts. Avoid dairy and fatty foods. Consult a healthcare provider if symptoms persist beyond 24 hours.

diseases.name: Typhoid
diseases.initial_advice: Rest and stay hydrated. Seek medical attention for proper diagnosis and antibiotic treatment.

diseases.name: Cholera
diseases.initial_advice: Immediate rehydration is critical. Seek emergency medical care for proper treatment and antibiotics.
